return_value_origin.detail: The return value is the result of FormatFilters, which is a child function call. No forbidden literals are returned. The empty list [] is a PRD-defined default and is allowed as per declared literal expectations.

child_coverage.detail: All three child functions (ParseFilters, ValidateFilters, FormatFilters) are directly called in the parent code.

no_direct_access.detail: The code does not directly read or write any global variable or data source. All data operations go through child function calls.

no_cross_calls.detail: No child calls another child. The parent mediates all data flow.

dataflow_conformance.detail: All declared dataflow edges are realized: parent input to ParseFilters, ParseFilters output to parent, parent filters to ValidateFilters, ValidateFilters output to parent, parent validated_filters to FormatFilters, FormatFilters output to parent. The parent correctly adds the default tags before passing to ValidateFilters.
